metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students participate as members of a working theatre company or ensemble, developing performance skills and collaborative theatrical practice. This course emphasizes character development, ensemble work, and professional theatre standards.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on collaborative theatre practices through participation in an organized theatre ensemble.

big_ideas.statement: Theatre companies operate as collaborative ensembles where actors, directors, and creative teams work together to create shared artistic experiences.
big_ideas.elaboration: Theatre companies require clear communication, mutual respect, and commitment to collective artistic vision while valuing individual contributions.

big_ideas.statement: Character development and performance require deep understanding of text, motivation, and relationships.
big_ideas.elaboration: Theatre artists develop characters by analyzing scripts, understanding dramatic function, and discovering authentic emotional and physical expression.

big_ideas.statement: Professional theatre practice involves commitment, discipline, and adherence to established standards and protocols.
big_ideas.elaboration: Theatre companies operate with clear expectations for rehearsal conduct, performance standards, and professional communication.

big_ideas.statement: Theatre creates community and transforms audiences through shared live experiences.
big_ideas.elaboration: Theatre companies serve as vehicles for cultural expression, community building, and the creation of meaningful connections between performers and audiences.

i_can_statements: I can analyze a character and understand their motivations
I can make specific, intentional character choices
I can execute movement and vocal work appropriate to my character
I can develop authentic emotional connection to my performance

competencies.raw: Create ensemble presence and collaborative performance
i_can_statements: I can listen and respond authentically to other actors on stage
I can maintain focus and presence during scenes
I can contribute to ensemble energy and cohesion
I can balance individual character work with ensemble needs

competencies.raw: Explore diverse acting techniques and performance styles
i_can_statements: I can experiment with different acting approaches and methods
I can adapt my performance to various genres and styles
I can explore both realistic and stylized performance modes
I can develop flexibility as a performer
I can control my body and movement for expressive effect
I can project and modulate my voice appropriately
I can use physicality to communicate character and emotion
I can develop technical vocal and movement skills

competencies.raw: Analyze scripts and scripts and understand dramatic structure
i_can_statements: I can identify plot structure and character arcs in plays
I can analyze dialogue and subtext
I can understand how scenes function within the overall drama
I can recognize thematic and symbolic elements in scripts

competencies.raw: Reflect on character development and personal performance
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my character choices and their effectiveness
I can identify my strengths and areas for growth as a performer
I can reflect on how I've developed a character over time
I can set meaningful performance goals

competencies.raw: Understand professional theatre standards and practices
i_can_statements: I can explain the structure and operations of theatre companies
I can understand the roles and responsibilities of company members
I can recognize professional standards for rehearsal and performance
I can appreciate the collaboration required in theatre production

competencies.raw: Connect theatre to cultural and historical contexts
i_can_statements: I can understand the cultural and historical origins of plays
I can analyze how historical events influence dramatic works
I can reflect on how theatre reflects and shapes society
I can appreciate diverse theatrical traditions

competencies.raw: Communicate effectively within rehearsal and performance environments
i_can_statements: I can understand and respond to director feedback
I can ask clarifying questions and seek guidance
I can give constructive feedback to ensemble members
I can communicate professionally and respectfully

competencies.raw: Learn scripts and maintain performance continuity
i_can_statements: I can memorize lines and blocking accurately
I can maintain script fidelity while developing character
I can perform consistently across multiple performances
I can make adjustments based on director notes

competencies.raw: Perform with presence and engagement for audiences
i_can_statements: I can perform with focus and emotional availability
I can engage audiences and communicate character intentions
I can adapt my performance based on audience energy
I can create meaningful connections with audiences

competencies.raw: Participate in company communication and community engagement
i_can_statements: I can contribute to company discussions and planning
I can participate in public relations and audience engagement
I can discuss the company's work meaningfully with audiences
I can represent the company professionally in public contexts

competencies.raw: Connect to diverse theatre traditions and contemporary practices
i_can_statements: I can learn about and appreciate theatre from diverse cultures
I can perform in various theatrical styles and traditions
I can understand how different traditions inform contemporary theatre
I can respectfully engage with culturally specific theatrical forms

competencies.raw: Expand artistic range and versatility as a performer
i_can_statements: I can take on diverse roles and character types
I can develop versatility across genres and styles
I can challenge myself with complex roles and techniques
I can grow artistically through diverse theatrical experiences

competencies.raw: Explore career pathways in professional theatre
i_can_statements: I can understand diverse career opportunities in theatre
I can network with theatre professionals and communities
I can develop a portfolio of performance work
I can create a plan for continued professional development

competencies.raw: Build connections between theatre and community
i_can_statements: I can understand theatre's role in community and culture
I can participate in outreach and educational theatre activities
I can make theatre accessible and meaningful to diverse audiences
I can contribute to theatre's social and cultural impact

areas.name: Technical Skills and Production
topics: Safety and professional conduct on stage
